src/lib/components/MolstarViewer.react.j.description: The Molstar viewer component for dash

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks.

style.description: The HTML property `style` to control the appearence of the container of molstar viewer.

className.description: The HTML property `class` for additional class names of the container of molstar viewer.

data.description:
Data containing the structure info that should be loaded into molstar viewer, as well as some control flags.
The data can be generated with python method `parse_molecule`.

layout.description:
The layout of the molstar viewer. Determining what controls to be displayed. 

The layout is not allowed to be changed once the component has been initialized.

selection.description: The structure region to be selected in the molstar viewer.

hover.description: The structure region to be hovered in the molstar viewer.

focus.description: The structure region to let the camera focus on in the molstar viewer.

frame.description: The trajectory frame in the molstar viewer.

measurement.description: The measurements in the molstar viewer.

camera.description: The camera object in the molstar viewer.

cameradebounce.description:
Debounce time in milliseconds for camera change events.
Set to 0 to disable debounce. Default is 100ms.

cameraresponddrag.description:
Whether to respond to drag events of the camera.
Set to false to disable camera parameter updates while dragging
with mouse keys, or scrolling.

screenshot.description:
The screenshot object containing the options for taking 
screenshot of the current view in molstar viewer.

updatefocusonframechange.description: Update focus data when frame index have changed.

updateselectiononframechange.description: Update selection data when frame index have changed.

setProps.description:
Dash-assigned callback that should be called to report property changes
to Dash, to make them available for callbacks.
